billing_instructions: Deposits may be required before work begins. Remaining balance due at project completion.
deposit_policy_text: Most custom projects require a deposit before fabrication or installation begins. Deposits secure build time and cover material costs.
dns_notes: Domain and DNS controlled through Cloudflare.
operator_bio: Ralph Williams is the founder and operator behind Gotta Know It Customs, an independent Minneapolis-based shop focused on custom vehicle builds, audio installations, and visual upgrades. Known for a hands-on approach and attention to detail, Ralph works directly with clients to turn ideas into finished builds that stand out on the road. From sound systems and lighting to wraps and fabrication, his projects focus on both performance and style. Gotta Know It Customs is built on practical experience, straightforward communication, and a passion for making vehicles look and sound exactly the way owners imagine.
payment_instructions: Deposits and payments are accepted via invoice or agreed payment method. Final payment is required before vehicle pickup.
payout_note: Operator retains full control of project billing and payment collection.
privacy_policy_text: Customer contact information is used only for communication related to vehicle builds, estimates, and project updates. Personal information is not sold or shared with third parties except when required for payment processing or legal compliance.
terms_of_service_text: All custom vehicle work is quoted based on project scope and materials. Estimates may change if additional work is requested or if unforeseen issues are discovered during installation. Deposits are generally non-refundable once materials are ordered or work begins. Customers are responsible for approving final design choices before fabrication starts.
transfer_notes: Operator site configured for independent management. Platform access and infrastructure details documented during deployment.
